scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w @bible-bawl/api" "npm run dev -w @bible-bawl/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bible-bawl/api && npm run build -w @bible-bawl/web && npm run build -w @bible-bawl/cloud
scripts.test: npm run test -w @bible-bawl/api && npm run test -w @bible-bawl/cloud && npm run test -w @bible-bawl/web
scripts.publicar: npm run build -w @bible-bawl/web && npm run deploy -w @bible-bawl/cloud
scripts.publicar:temporario: npm run build -w @bible-bawl/web && npm run deploy:temporary -w @bible-bawl/cloud
